---
title: "Shipping & Delivery Policy"
---

*Last updated: 2025*

## Service Area

Pine Straw Distributors LLC primarily serves buyers in northern Florida and southern
Georgia. Delivery availability outside this area is considered on a case-by-case basis.
Contact us to discuss your location and volume requirements.

## Delivery Formats

We deliver pine straw in three formats depending on order size and customer equipment:

- **Standard Bales** — delivered by truck, no special equipment required for offloading
- **Palletized Bales** — requires forklift or pallet jack for offloading
- **Round Big Bales** — requires tractor equipment for handling

## Lead Times

Delivery lead times vary by season and availability. Contact us directly for current
scheduling and availability.

## Minimum Orders

Minimum order quantities vary by delivery format. Please contact us for current minimums
and pricing at jane@pinestrwadistributors.com.
